name: System Friction Institute
primary_definition: System Friction Institute makes visible the friction that systems learn to normalize.
operational_definition: An evidence-governed instrument for observing a signal inside a changing field, proposing a minimal intervention and learning from the documented difference between prediction and outcome.
canonical_question: What structural configuration of a signal, under what world state and field conditions, produces particular patterns of propagation, persistence, transformation or disappearance?

instruments.name: Marco Integrado de Homeostasis Multivariable
instruments.purpose: Measure structural variables and friction/homeostasis conditions with explicit evidence and missing-data handling.

instruments.name: Minimal Observation and Perturbation Protocol
instruments.purpose: Form a governed minimal-intervention hypothesis, preserve a return hash and compare later evidence against the initial state.

instruments.name: World Spectrum Observation
instruments.purpose: Persist world-state snapshots, source health, confidence and longitudinal domain observations.

instruments.name: World Vector
instruments.purpose: Represent current domain values, tensions, dominant signals and observed context.

instruments.name: Adaptive Meta-Observer
instruments.purpose: Accumulate internal signal measurements, external evidence, provisional predictions, interventions, outcomes and governed model learning.

instruments.name: Atlas / SFI Reference Bank
instruments.purpose: Normalize observable cases and link each case to explicit evidence relations, prediction-at-T0, outcomes and model versions.

phase_model.name: Infrastructure
phase_model.output: Persistent evidence, snapshots, audit, cases and model contracts

phase_model.name: Internal signal
phase_model.output: MIHM structural measurement and internal signal strength

phase_model.name: External evidence
phase_model.output: Audited External Evidence Vector with explicit reliability and missing values

phase_model.name: Provisional prediction
phase_model.output: Gated prediction with interval, confidence and calibration warning

phase_model.name: Minimal intervention
phase_model.output: Governed low-cost reversible intervention and return window

phase_model.name: Outcome and error
phase_model.output: Observed outcome, residual, absolute error, squared error and error class

phase_model.name: Historical calibration
phase_model.output: Governed model promotion after an eligible closed-case corpus

phase_model.name: Operational UI
phase_model.output: Role-appropriate ROOT, Studio, FIELD and Observatory surfaces

phase_model.name: Governance and cost
phase_model.output: Consent, audit, explicit confirmation, degraded mode and budget controls

consent_contract.rule: No Phase 1 observation of a person, organization or movement without documented explicit consent.

interpretation_limits: Missing data must remain MISSING and must not be converted to zero or an average.
A provisional prediction is not historically validated.
Platform reach does not establish artistic, moral or cultural value.
Operational access events are governance traces, not phenomenon evidence unless explicitly linked.
Public summaries do not expose private evidence, private identities or founder-only runtime state.
Do not infer undisclosed psychological states, motives or diagnoses.

analytics.allowed_scope: Page navigation and non-PII instrument-use events
